---
title: "Charles Thomas John Hiatt"
---

## Charles Thomas John Hiatt

**Dates:** (1869-1904)

### Description

autograph hunter

### Biography

His mother ran a girls\' school in Wellington, Shropshire, which may explain his reading <i>Atalanta</i>.  He tried a similar trick on Thomas Hardy to obtain his autograph:  see Martin Ray, \'Thomas Hardy\'s Letter to Charles Hiatt\' <i>Notes and Queries</i> 53 (2006), 338.

### Letters

- Letter from Febry 21st 1889

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
